title: rosa × submitis var. ramealis
intro: Rosa × submitis var. ramealis, also known as Rosa rugosa var. ramealis, is a variety of rugosa rose, a hybrid rose native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Rosa × submitis var. ramealis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health. Rosa × submitis var. ramealis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
